name: Custom issue
about: General zDash issue, discussion, or task
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Type**
- [ ] Question / discussion
- [ ] Security concern (report sensitive issues privately via SECURITY.md)
- [ ] CI/CD / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation / runbooks
- [ ] Release / versioning
- [ ] Governance / policy
- [ ] Other

**Description**

**Context**
- zDash version: `{{ "$(cat VERSION || git describe --tags)" }}`
- Related phase or area: (e.g. `docs/prompts/phase12-exec.prompt`, risk system, dashboard)

**Checklist**
- [ ] Reviewed CONTRIBUTING.md and AGENTS.md
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens included
